error.offset_too_recent: Consumption Start Date must be at least one month in the past.

user.title: Connect to ista Calista

data_description.email: Enter the email address associated with your ista Calista account.
data_description.password: Enter the password for your ista Calista account.
data_description.consumption_offset_date: Select the date from which to start importing historical consumption data (must be at least 1 month ago).
data_description.season_start: Select the day and month when a new consumption season begins.

user.description: Connect your **ista Calista** account to Home Assistant to access your heating and water usage data.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure ista Calista

data_description.email: Enter the email address associated with your ista Calista account.
data_description.password: Enter the password for your ista Calista account.
data_description.consumption_offset_date: Select the date from which to start importing historical consumption data (must be at least 1 month ago).
data_description.season_start: Select the day and month when a new consumption season begins.

reconfigure.description: Update the configuration for your **ista Calista** account ({email}).

reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]
reauth_confirm.description: Authentication expired for {email}. Please re-enter your password to reconnect your ista Calista account.

data_description.password: Enter the current password for your ista Calista account associated with {email}.

data_description.update_interval: Frequency (in hours) at which to check for new consumption data from the ista Calista portal.
data_description.log_level: Set the detail level for integration and library logs. 'Debug' is very verbose and should only be used for troubleshooting.
data_description.season_start: Select the day and month when a new consumption season begins.

error.interval_too_short: Update interval must be at least 1 hour.

download_invoice.name: Download invoice
download_invoice.description: Downloads an invoice PDF using its specific ID.

invoice_id.name: Invoice ID
invoice_id.description: The unique ID of the invoice (e.g., from a bill sensor's attributes).

get_invoices.name: Get invoices
get_invoices.description: Returns a detailed list of all invoices found in your account.

authentication_exception.message: Authentication failed for {email}. Please check your login credentials and re-authenticate.
